chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4203 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on Misc. No.18502/2024 2. For hearing of main case 22.05.2025 Mr. Ahmed Masood, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for the respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Gobind Kumar, Deputy Commissioner Inland Revenue. Per learned for respondent the impugned notice is being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the respondents to initiate proceedings if permissible under the law. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
